description: Thresholds for the RedStone oracle-divergence gate

warn_bp.description: Soft divergence threshold in basis points. Below this is always allowed; at or above triggers the sustained-drift branch when enabled.

deny_bp.description: Hard divergence threshold in basis points. At or above this, the deposit is denied immediately.

deny_sustained_seconds.description: Minimum seconds of sustained divergence (current and prior snapshot both at/above warn_bp) required to deny when enable_sustained_check is true.

max_feed_age_seconds.description: Maximum allowed age of the RedStone price feed in seconds. Stale feeds deny.

enable_sustained_check.description: Whether to evaluate the sustained-drift branch. Requires the caller to pass prevSnapshot in wasm_args.
